title: Morisonia martiana
taxonomy: Morisonia martiana is a species of plant that belongs to the family Capparaceae. It is a type of flowering plant, classified under the kingdom Plantae. Within the kingdom, it is further classified under the division Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. The order Capparales and the family Capparaceae are also part of its classification. At the genus and species level, Morisonia martiana is classified as a distinct species within the genus Morisonia.

The plant is traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
